Name: Seasonal enclosures for sidewalk cafes.
Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to seasonal enclosures for sidewalk cafes

History.Description: This Introduction was Introduced by Council
This Introduction was Referred to Comm by Council to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure
This Introduction was Hearing Held by Committee
This Introduction was Laid Over by Committee

Summary: This bill would allow sidewalk cafe operators to temporarily enclose their year-round sidewalk cafes annually from October 1 through March 31.
Text:
Be it enacted by the Council as follows:
      
      
      Section 1. Paragraph 2 of subdivision b of section 19-160 of the administrative code of the city of New York, as added by local law number 121 for the year 2023, is amended to read as follows:
      2. A sidewalk cafe, other than an enclosed sidewalk cafe, shall be open-air and shall contain only readily removable tables, chairs and other removable decorative items, [as set forth in such rules] except that a sidewalk cafe may include removable vertical screenings and overhead coverings from October 1 to March 31, inclusive. 
      � 2. This local law takes effect 120 days after it becomes law.
